name: data_requests_create
description: Create a shareable form link to collect data from a person. When the person completes the form, the PDF template is automatically filled. Supports email-based authentication, field-level permissions, and signature collection.

parameters.name: template_id
parameters.description: The template ID for the data request.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Pre-filled data for fields the requester already knows.

parameters.name: data_requests
parameters.description: Array of request objects, each with: email (string), name (string), fields (array of field names), auth_type (string: password, oauth, email_link, phone_number).

parameters.name: test
parameters.description: If true, generates a test submission.
